title: The Straw Hats Take Control
description: On pages 16–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Hody Jones, Zoro, Sanji, Jinbe. The core beat is the straw hats take control.
scene: The scene follows the straw hats take control, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Hody Jones, Zoro, Sanji, Jinbe.
summary: The Straw Hats Take Control. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
